name: Shivam J. Thete
title: Strategic Development Leader
headline: I build operating systems that turn strategy into measurable business outcomes.
summary: I work at the intersection of leadership, systems design, and cross-functional execution. My portfolio is centered on building scalable operating models across sales, finance, HR, and project delivery through process design, software implementation, and decision-ready reporting.

executiveSnapshot.label: Leadership focus
executiveSnapshot.value: Strategy, execution, and operating model design

executiveSnapshot.label: Business coverage
executiveSnapshot.value: Sales, finance, HR, and delivery operations

executiveSnapshot.label: Transformation style
executiveSnapshot.value: Systems, automation, governance, and insight visibility

metrics.label: Leadership work spanning commercial and internal operations
Projects framed around margin, utilization, forecasting, and accountability
Execution built through platforms, dashboards, and automation
Portfolio positioned for business transformation roles

focusAreas: Translate leadership priorities into process architecture and delivery plans.
Create visibility into business performance with dashboards, metrics, and governance.
Improve execution quality by replacing fragmented workflows with scalable systems.

workMethod.title: Diagnose
workMethod.description: Surface structural issues, decision bottlenecks, and operational risk.

workMethod.title: Design
workMethod.description: Define workflows, ownership, SLAs, metrics, and system behaviors.

workMethod.title: Build
workMethod.description: Implement software, automation, and reporting layers that teams can adopt quickly.

workMethod.title: Embed
workMethod.description: Drive rollout, team usage, and business measurement after launch.

audienceGuides.label: HR
audienceGuides.question: Is this profile relevant for a leadership hiring process?
audienceGuides.summary: This lens highlights role fit, cross-functional breadth, and the consistency of leadership themes across the portfolio.
lookFor: Cross-functional scope across sales, finance, HR, and delivery
Clear evidence that the profile is business-oriented rather than purely technical
audienceGuides.startHere: Review the executive snapshot, then scan featured projects for business impact.

audienceGuides.label: Hiring Manager
audienceGuides.question: Can this person diagnose problems, build systems, and drive execution?
audienceGuides.summary: This lens focuses on operating method, project framing, and whether the work shows ownership from problem definition through implementation.
lookFor: How problems are translated into process and system responses
Whether projects show measurable outcomes and adoption thinking
Evidence of execution discipline, not just ideas
audienceGuides.startHere: Use the project explorer to open one project at a time and compare challenge, response, and impact.

audienceGuides.label: Business Leader
audienceGuides.question: Does this portfolio show strategic judgment and operating leverage?
audienceGuides.summary: This lens surfaces the business value of the work: visibility, governance, forecasting, utilization, margin awareness, and scalability.
lookFor: Whether the work improves decision quality for leadership
How systems create operational leverage and reporting visibility
Patterns that suggest transformation potential across functions
audienceGuides.startHere: Scan the outcome metrics first, then review projects through the leadership value section.
